title: file: parallel tests race on fixed /tmp paths
description: Trigger: cargo test default parallel execution. put_and_get_roundtrip, put_creates_with_mode_0600, and refresh_sees_external_write all use fixed filenames like secretx_file_test_roundtrip.bin. Two test workers clobber each other's writes, producing flaky assert_eq\! failures. Fix: use tempfile::NamedTempFile or encode process ID into the path.
